name: Labvanced
tagline: Online experiment platform with built-in eye tracking
short_impression: Labvanced is a comprehensive online experiment platform that integrates webcam-based eye tracking directly into its experiment builder. Designed for psychology and behavioral research, it combines no-code experiment design with advanced features including eye tracking, EEG integration, and participant management. The platform's eye tracking has been peer-reviewed and validated for research use, achieving accuracy comparable to dedicated webcam solutions.
pros: Integrated experiment builder with eye tracking
No programming required for basic experiments
cons: Eye tracking limited to supported browsers
Learning curve for advanced experiment designs

papers.title: Labvanced: A unified JavaScript framework for online studies
papers.authors: Finger, H., Goeke, C., Diekamp, D., Standvoß, K., & König, P.

claimed_accuracy: 300-400% improvement over existing technologies like WebGazer (vendor claim)
privacy_notes: Data stored on Labvanced servers. GDPR compliant. Institutional agreements available for data residency requirements.
